mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bill ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM bill WHERE is_paid = #{isPaid} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill (check_in_id, room_charge, other_charges, total_amount, is_paid, payment_method, notes) VALUES (#{checkInId}, #{roomCharge}, #{otherCharges}, #{totalAmount}, #{isPaid}, #{paymentMethod}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE bill SET is_paid=1, paid_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
